project_type: Full-stack care home management platform (CareVista) - React/TypeScript frontend with Vite, Express/TypeScript backend
build_system: npm scripts - frontend uses tsc + vite build, backend uses tsc
build_command: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'cd frontend && npm run build' - should complete with zero TS errors. 2. Run 'cd backend && npm run build' - should complete with zero TS errors.
setup_instructions: 1. cd frontend && npm install. 2. cd backend && npm install. 3. Install missing type declarations.
environment_constraints: Open internet access - npm packages can be installed freely. No database or Redis running, so only compile-time verification is possible.
key_patterns: Frontend: Pages in src/pages/, components in src/components/, types in src/types/index.ts, hooks in src/hooks/, services in src/services/, store in src/store/. Backend: Controllers in src/controllers/, routes in single src/routes/index.ts, middleware in src/middleware/, models in src/models/, services in src/services/. All backend route handlers use (req, res, next) pattern with try/catch. Frontend uses TanStack React Query for data fetching, Zustand for state, React Router 6 for routing.
directory_structure: Root: frontend/, backend/, docker/, docker-compose.yml. Frontend: src/pages/ (60+ pages), src/components/, src/hooks/, src/services/, src/store/, src/types/index.ts. Backend: src/controllers/ (57 controllers), src/routes/index.ts (all routes), src/middleware/, src/models/, src/services/, src/types/.
